summary: Testing completed for DIOT Module and Bank Module (Estados de Cuenta) features. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: DIOT Module correctly shows empty state when no paid egreso invoices exist
Export buttons correctly show 'No hay datos para exportar' toast when no data
Bank Module Estados de Cuenta tab has all required fields in the dialog
Bank transaction creation via API works correctly (verified with pytest)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Deposito de prueba bank transaction via API for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: DIOT and Bank Module features fully tested. DIOT shows 0 records because no paid egreso invoices exist - this is correct behavior. Bank accounts exist: BBVA MXN $500,000 and Citibanamex USD $25,000. Test bank transaction created via API is visible in Estados de Cuenta tab.
